name: dealengine
description: DealEngine — AI acquisitions platform for off-market residential real estate

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dealengine/shared && npm run build -w @dealengine/compliance -w @dealengine/scoring -w @dealengine/underwriting -w @dealengine/integrations && npm run build -w @dealengine/ai && npm run build -w @dealengine/core && npm run build -w @dealengine/api -w @dealengine/workers
